headline: Unemployment Engulfs Key Chinese Age Group as AI Use Spreads
summary: (Bloomberg) -- An unexpected deterioration in China’s labor market has reached the key demographic of early-career workers, as seasonal pressures amplified spillovers from the war in Iran while wider use of artificial intelligence raises risks for employment. Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking for the ExitTrump Encourages Companies Not to Seek Tariff RefundsTrump Extends Iran
